exploration_notes: The controller work queue with rate limiting is implemented in client-go's util/workqueue package across 4 files: (1) queue.go defines the base TypedInterface with Add/Get/Done methods and the Typed struct implementing the reconcile loop queue management; (2) delaying_queue.go defines TypedDelayingInterface which extends the base interface with AddAfter for delayed re-enqueue; (3) rate_limiting_queue.go defines RateLimitingInterface/TypedRateLimitingInterface which extends delaying with AddRateL
